name: webgl-fluid
when_to_use: 教流体/GPU 模拟/向量场直觉,或做可交互流体背景时用;要严谨 CFD 数值分析不适合。augment 边界:整套 Navier-Stokes GLSL 管线由库内置,消费 AI 只给一个 canvas + 大写常量 config,交互(splat)由库自带的 canvas/window 监听驱动。
why_valuable: 实时 GPU Navier-Stokes(平流/散度/压力迭代/涡量约束,多趟 GLSL shader + framebuffer ping-pong)AI 徒手写整条 shader 管线基本跑不通,是最能体现『原生做不出』的类目;这是 PavelDoGreat 名作的 ESM 重打包。

data_in.note: 这不是外部数据而是模拟参数;键名全大写常量,值域见各字段。canvas(DOM)由 boot 注入,config 是 WebGLFluid(canvas, config) 的第二参。

schema.SIM_RESOLUTION?: number —— 速度场分辨率,默认 128
schema.DYE_RESOLUTION?: number —— 染料场分辨率,默认 1024
schema.DENSITY_DISSIPATION?: number —— 染料耗散,默认 1(越大越快消散)
schema.COLORFUL?: boolean —— 彩色循环,默认 true
schema.SPLAT_COLOR?: { r:number, g:number, b:number } —— 固定色(COLORFUL=false 时)
schema.BACK_COLOR?: { r:number, g:number, b:number } —— 背景色,默认 {r:0,g:0,b:0}
schema.TRANSPARENT?: boolean —— 透明背景,默认 false
schema.AUTO?: boolean —— 自动 splat,默认 false;配 INTERVAL(ms) 定时

spec.note: canvas 需同时设 style 尺寸与像素 buffer(canvas.width/height 应等于 clientWidth/Height);禁 vh 高,给 canvas 显式 px 高,否则 WebGL viewport 为 0。

en.when_to_use: Use it to teach intuition for fluids/GPU simulation/vector fields, or as an interactive fluid background; it is not appropriate for rigorous CFD numerical analysis. Augmentation boundary: the full Navier-Stokes GLSL pipeline is built into the library. Consuming AI supplies only a canvas plus an uppercase-constant config, while interaction (splat) is driven by the library's own canvas/window listeners.
en.why_valuable: A real-time GPU Navier-Stokes pipeline (advection, divergence, pressure iteration, vorticity confinement, multi-pass GLSL shaders, and framebuffer ping-pong) is extremely unlikely to run when hand-written by AI. This category most clearly demonstrates what cannot be built natively; it is an ESM repackaging of PavelDoGreat's well-known implementation.

data_in.note: These are simulation parameters, not external data. Keys are uppercase constants, with ranges documented per field. boot injects the canvas (DOM), and config is the second argument to WebGLFluid(canvas, config).

schema.DENSITY_DISSIPATION?: number -- dye dissipation; default 1 (larger dissipates faster)
schema.SPLAT_COLOR?: { r:number, g:number, b:number } -- fixed color (when COLORFUL=false)
schema.BACK_COLOR?: { r:number, g:number, b:number } -- background color; default {r:0,g:0,b:0}
schema.AUTO?: boolean -- automatic splat; default false; pair with INTERVAL(ms) for timing

spec.note: Set both the canvas style dimensions and pixel buffer (canvas.width/height should equal clientWidth/Height). Do not use vh height; give the canvas an explicit px height or the WebGL viewport will be 0.

example._why: config 全是大写常量键,钉死真实键名与 hover/click 触发。

uplink: 纯本地 GPU 演示,无上行;交互(splat)由库内建的 canvas 指针监听与 window 键盘监听驱动。

carriers.widget: conditional:canvas 落 shadow 可正常渲染,但库对 window 挂了 keydown/mouseup/touchend 且无销毁钩子,全局键盘监听会驻留整个页面生命周期
carriers.codex: supported:WebGL canvas,无 worker/wasm;注意 window 全局监听不可回收

isolation.evidence: dist +esm default export WebGLFluid(canvas, config) 已核。指针监听(mousedown/mousemove/touchstart/touchmove)绑定在传入的 canvas 元素上(已 scoped)。但有三个监听绑在 window 且从不移除:window.addEventListener('mouseup')、('touchend')、('keydown')——WebGLFluid 返回 void、不给销毁句柄,故在 widget/shadow 下 keydown 处理器会驻留整页。零 document.head / 零 style 注入 / 零 body 变更;渲染全在传入 canvas 内(WebGL context)。shadowCompatible=conditional:canvas 在 shadow 渲染正常,唯一隐患是不可回收的 window keydown/mouseup/touchend。config 键(TRIGGER/DENSITY_DISSIPATION/VELOCITY_DISSIPATION/PRESSURE/CURL/SPLAT_RADIUS/SPLAT_FORCE/COLORFUL/BACK_COLOR/TRANSPARENT/BLOOM/SUNRAYS...)已在 dist mjs 核实存在。
